importantVotes.title: Oracle Software and Cloud Services Contract — $94.6M
importantVotes.description: Increases the city's contract with Mythics LLC for Oracle software licenses and cloud computing solutions by $34.6 million to a total of $94.6 million and extends the term through November 2028. Fielder was excused.

importantVotes.title: CleanPowerSF Long Duration Battery Storage — $75.9M
importantVotes.description: Authorizes CleanPowerSF to participate in a 20-year agreement to purchase power from the Willow Rock long-duration energy storage project for up to $75.9 million, as part of the city's clean energy transition. Fielder was excused.

importantVotes.title: Updated Climate Action Plan
importantVotes.description: Updates the city's Environment Code to establish new climate action goals and clarify each department's responsibilities for achieving them, codifying SF's framework for reducing greenhouse gas emissions. Fielder was excused.

importantVotes.title: Support Federal Office-to-Housing Tax Credit Bill
importantVotes.description: Expresses support for the federal Revitalizing Downtowns and Main Streets Act, which would create a federal tax credit to encourage conversion of vacant office and commercial buildings into housing — a key strategy for SF's downtown recovery. Severed from consent by Sauter. Fielder was excused.

importantVotes.title: Homekey+ Grant for Veterans Housing at 629 Post — $15.9M
importantVotes.description: Authorizes the city to jointly apply with Swords to Plowshares for a state Homekey+ grant of up to $15.9 million to acquire or rehabilitate 629 Post Street for permanent supportive housing for veterans. Fielder was excused.

importantVotes.title: Prop 47 Diversion Grant — $7.96M
importantVotes.description: Retroactively authorizes DPH to accept a $7.96 million state Proposition 47 grant to expand mental health and drug diversion programs that reduce incarceration, running through June 2029. Fielder was excused.

importantVotes.title: Property Assessment System Contract Extension — $33.9M
importantVotes.description: Extends the Assessor-Recorder's contract with Sapient Corporation for its property assessment database system through June 2032 and increases the total contract to $33.9 million, adding 4.5 years to the original nine-year deal. Fielder was excused.
